v.CNV: 神顾念挪亚和所有与他一同在方舟里的走兽和牲畜；　神使风吹过大地，水就渐渐退了。
v.ESV: But God remembered Noah and all the beasts and all the livestock that were with him in the ark. And God made a wind blow over the earth, and the waters subsided.
v.GAE: 하나님이 노아와 그와 함께 방주에 있는 모든 들짐승과 가축을 기억하사 하나님이 바람을 땅 위에 불게 하시매 물이 줄어들었고
v.KJV: And God remembered Noah, and every living thing, and all the cattle that was with him in the ark: and God made a wind to pass over the earth, and the waters asswaged;
v.NASB: But God remembered Noah and all the beasts and all the cattle that were with him in the ark; and God caused a wind to pass over the earth, and the water subsided.
v.NIV: But God remembered Noah and all the wild animals and the livestock that were with him in the ark, and he sent a wind over the earth, and the waters receded.
v.NRSV: But God remembered Noah and all the wild animals and all the domestic animals that were with him in the ark. And God made a wind blow over the earth, and the waters subsided;
v.SAENEW: 그 때에 하나님이, 노아와 방주에 함께 있는 모든 들짐승과 집짐승을 돌아보실 생각을 하시고, 땅 위에 바람을 일으키시니, 물이 빠지기 시작하였다.
v.WLB: 하나님께서 노아와 그와 함께 방주 안에 있던 모든 들짐승과 가축을 기억하시고 땅에 바람을 보내시니 물이 줄어들었습니다.

v.CNV: 深渊的泉源和天上的窗户，都关闭起来；天降的大雨也止住了。
v.ESV: The fountains of the deep and the windows of the heavens were closed, the rain from the heavens was restrained,
v.GAE: 깊음의 샘과 하늘의 창문이 닫히고 하늘에서 비가 그치매
v.KJV: The fountains also of the deep and the windows of heaven were stopped, and the rain from heaven was restrained;
v.NASB: Also the fountains of the deep and the floodgates of the sky were closed, and the rain from the sky was restrained;
v.NIV: Now the springs of the deep and the floodgates of the heavens had been closed, and the rain had stopped falling from the sky.
v.NRSV: the fountains of the deep and the windows of the heavens were closed, the rain from the heavens was restrained,
v.SAENEW: 땅 속의 깊은 샘들과 하늘의 홍수 문들이 닫히고, 하늘에서 내리는 비도 그쳤다.
v.WLB: 깊음의 샘들과 하늘의 창들이 닫히고 비가 하늘에서 그쳤습니다.

v.CNV: 水从地上不断退去，过了一百五十天，水就消退了。
v.ESV: and the waters receded from the earth continually. At the end of 150 days the waters had abated,
v.GAE: 물이 땅에서 물러가고 점점 물러가서 백오십 일 후에 줄어들고
v.KJV: And the waters returned from off the earth continually: and after the end of the hundred and fifty days the waters were abated.
v.NASB: and the water receded steadily from the earth, and at the end of one hundred and fifty days the water decreased.
v.NIV: The water receded steadily from the earth. At the end of the hundred and fifty days the water had gone down,
v.NRSV: and the waters gradually receded from the earth. At the end of one hundred fifty days the waters had abated;
v.SAENEW: 땅에서 물이 줄어들고 또 줄어들어서, 백오십 일이 지나니, 물이 많이 빠졌다.
v.WLB: 물이 땅에서 점점 줄어들어서 150일 후에는 물이 많이 빠졌습니다.

v.CNV: 七月十七日，方舟停在亚拉腊山上。
v.ESV: and in the seventh month, on the seventeenth day of the month, the ark came to rest on the mountains of Ararat.
v.GAE: 일곱째 달 곧 그 달 열이렛날에 방주가 아라랏 산에 머물렀으며
v.KJV: And the ark rested in the seventh month, on the seventeenth day of the month, upon the mountains of Ararat.
v.NASB: In the seventh month, on the seventeenth day of the month, the ark rested upon the mountains of Ararat.
v.NIV: and on the seventeenth day of the seventh month the ark came to rest on the mountains of Ararat.
v.NRSV: and in the seventh month, on the seventeenth day of the month, the ark came to rest on the mountains of Ararat.
v.SAENEW: 일곱째 달 열이렛날에, 방주가 아라랏 산에 머물러 쉬었다.
v.WLB: 방주가 일곱째 달, 곧 그 달 17일에 아라랏 산에 머물게 됐습니다.

v.CNV: 水继续消退，直到十月；到了十月初一，山顶都露出来了。
v.ESV: And the waters continued to abate until the tenth month; in the tenth month, on the first day of the month, the tops of the mountains were seen.
v.GAE: 물이 점점 줄어들어 열째 달 곧 그 달 초하룻날에 산들의 봉우리가 보였더라
v.KJV: And the waters decreased continually until the tenth month: in the tenth month, on the first day of the month, were the tops of the mountains seen.
v.NASB: The water decreased steadily until the tenth month; in the tenth month, on the first day of the month, the tops of the mountains became visible.
v.NIV: The waters continued to recede until the tenth month, and on the first day of the tenth month the tops of the mountains became visible.
v.NRSV: The waters continued to abate until the tenth month; in the tenth month, on the first day of the month, the tops of the mountains appeared.
v.SAENEW: 물은 열째 달이 될 때까지 줄곧 줄어들어서, 그 달 곧 열째 달 초하루에는 산 봉우리들이 드러났다.
v.WLB: 물이 열째 달까지 계속해서 빠졌고 열째 달, 곧 그 달 1일에 산봉우리들이 드러났습니다.

v.CNV: 过了四十天，挪亚开了他所做的方舟的窗户，
v.ESV: At the end of forty days Noah opened the window of the ark that he had made
v.GAE: 사십 일을 지나서 노아가 그 방주에 낸 창문을 열고
v.KJV: And it came to pass at the end of forty days, that Noah opened the window of the ark which he had made:
v.NASB: Then it came about at the end of forty days, that Noah opened the window of the ark which he had made;
v.NIV: After forty days Noah opened a window he had made in the ark
v.NRSV: At the end of forty days Noah opened the window of the ark that he had made
v.SAENEW: 사십 일이 지나서, 노아는 자기가 만든 방주의 창을 열고서,
v.WLB: 40일 후에 노아는 자신이 만든 방주의 창문을 열었습니다.

v.CNV: 放了一只乌鸦出去。地上的水还没有干，那乌鸦就一直飞来飞去。
v.ESV: and sent forth a raven. It went to and fro until the waters were dried up from the earth.
v.GAE: 까마귀를 내놓으매 까마귀가 물이 땅에서 마르기까지 날아 왕래하였더라
v.KJV: And he sent forth a raven, which went forth to and fro, until the waters were dried up from off the earth.
v.NASB: and he sent out a raven, and it flew here and there until the water was dried up from the earth.
v.NIV: and sent out a raven, and it kept flying back and forth until the water had dried up from the earth.
v.NRSV: and sent out the raven; and it went to and fro until the waters were dried up from the earth.
v.SAENEW: 까마귀 한 마리를 바깥으로 내보냈다. 그 까마귀는 땅에서 물이 마르기를 기다리며, 이리저리 날아다니기만 하였다.
v.WLB: 그가 까마귀를 내보내니 그 까마귀는 물이 땅에서 마를 때까지 날아다녔습니다.

v.CNV: 他又放了一只鸽子出去，要看看水从地上退了没有。
v.ESV: Then he sent forth a dove from him, to see if the waters had subsided from the face of the ground.
v.GAE: 그가 또 비둘기를 내놓아 지면에서 물이 줄어들었는지를 알고자 하매
v.KJV: Also he sent forth a dove from him, to see if the waters were abated from off the face of the ground;
v.NASB: Then he sent out a dove from him, to see if the water was abated from the face of the land;
v.NIV: Then he sent out a dove to see if the water had receded from the surface of the ground.
v.NRSV: Then he sent out the dove from him, to see if the waters had subsided from the face of the ground;
v.SAENEW: 그는 또 비둘기 한 마리를 내보내서, 땅에서 물이 얼마나 빠졌는지를 알아보려고 하였다.
v.WLB: 노아가 이번에는 물이 땅에서 줄어들었는지 알아보기 위해 비둘기를 내보냈습니다.

v.CNV: 因为遍地都是水，那鸽子找不着歇脚的地方，就回到挪亚的方舟那里；于是，挪亚伸出手去，把鸽子接进方舟里来。
v.ESV: But the dove found no place to set her foot, and she returned to him to the ark, for the waters were still on the face of the whole earth. So he put out his hand and took her and brought her into the ark with him.
v.GAE: 온 지면에 물이 있으므로 비둘기가 발 붙일 곳을 찾지 못하고 방주로 돌아와 그에게로 오는지라 그가 손을 내밀어 방주 안 자기에게로 받아들이고
v.KJV: But the dove found no rest for the sole of her foot, and she returned unto him into the ark, for the waters were on the face of the whole earth: then he put forth his hand, and took her, and pulled her in unto him into the ark.
v.NASB: but the dove found no resting place for the sole of her foot, so she returned to him into the ark, for the water was on the surface of all the earth. Then he put out his hand and took her, and brought her into the ark to himself.
v.NIV: But the dove could find nowhere to perch because there was water over all the surface of the earth; so it returned to Noah in the ark. He reached out his hand and took the dove and brought it back to himself in the ark.
v.NRSV: but the dove found no place to set its foot, and it returned to him to the ark, for the waters were still on the face of the whole earth. So he put out his hand and took it and brought it into the ark with him.
v.SAENEW: 그러나 땅이 아직 모두 물 속에 잠겨 있으므로, 그 비둘기는 발을 붙이고 쉴 만한 곳을 찾지 못하여, 그냥 방주로 돌아와서, 노아에게 왔다. 노아는 손을 내밀어 그 비둘기를 받아서, 자기가 있는 방주 안으로 끌어들였다.
v.WLB: 그러나 물이 아직 온 땅 위에 있었기 때문에 비둘기가 앉을 곳을 찾지 못해 방주에 있는 노아에게로 돌아왔습니다. 노아는 손을 내밀어 비둘기를 받아 방주 안으로 들였습니다.

v.CNV: 他再等了七天，又把鸽子从方舟里放出去。
v.ESV: He waited another seven days, and again he sent forth the dove out of the ark.
v.GAE: 또 칠 일을 기다려 다시 비둘기를 방주에서 내놓으매
v.KJV: And he stayed yet other seven days; and again he sent forth the dove out of the ark;
v.NASB: So he waited yet another seven days; and again he sent out the dove from the ark.
v.NIV: He waited seven more days and again sent out the dove from the ark.
v.NRSV: He waited another seven days, and again he sent out the dove from the ark;
v.SAENEW: 노아는 이레를 더 기다리다가, 그 비둘기를 다시 방주에서 내보냈다.
v.WLB: 노아가 7일을 더 기다려 비둘기를 방주에서 다시 내보냈습니다.

v.CNV: 到了黄昏的时候，鸽子回到挪亚那里，嘴里叼着一块新摘下来的橄榄树叶，挪亚就知道地上的水已经退了。
v.ESV: And the dove came back to him in the evening, and behold, in her mouth was a freshly plucked olive leaf. So Noah knew that the waters had subsided from the earth.
v.GAE: 저녁때에 비둘기가 그에게로 돌아왔는데 그 입에 감람나무 새 잎사귀가 있는지라 이에 노아가 땅에 물이 줄어든 줄을 알았으며
v.KJV: And the dove came in to him in the evening; and, lo, in her mouth was an olive leaf pluckt off: so Noah knew that the waters were abated from off the earth.
v.NASB: The dove came to him toward evening, and behold, in her beak was a freshly picked olive leaf. So Noah knew that the water was abated from the earth.
v.NIV: When the dove returned to him in the evening, there in its beak was a freshly plucked olive leaf! Then Noah knew that the water had receded from the earth.
v.NRSV: and the dove came back to him in the evening, and there in its beak was a freshly plucked olive leaf; so Noah knew that the waters had subsided from the earth.
v.SAENEW: 그 비둘기는 저녁때가 되어서 그에게로 되돌아왔는데, 비둘기가 금방 딴 올리브 잎을 부리에 물고 있었으므로, 노아는 땅 위에서 물이 빠진 것을 알았다.
v.WLB: 그 비둘기가 밤이 되자 그에게 돌아왔는데 그 부리에 새로 딴 올리브 나무 잎을 물고 있었습니다. 그래서 노아는 물이 땅에서 빠진 것을 알게 됐습니다.

v.CNV: 挪亚再等了七天，又把鸽子放出去，鸽子就再没有回到他那里。
v.ESV: Then he waited another seven days and sent forth the dove, and she did not return to him anymore.
v.GAE: 또 칠 일을 기다려 비둘기를 내놓으매 다시는 그에게로 돌아오지 아니하였더라
v.KJV: And he stayed yet other seven days; and sent forth the dove; which returned not again unto him any more.
v.NASB: Then he waited yet another seven days, and sent out the dove; but she did not return to him again.
v.NIV: He waited seven more days and sent the dove out again, but this time it did not return to him.
v.NRSV: Then he waited another seven days, and sent out the dove; and it did not return to him any more.
v.SAENEW: 노아는 다시 이레를 더 기다리다가, 그 비둘기를 내보냈다. 그러나 이번에는 그 비둘기가 그에게로 다시 돌아오지 않았다.
v.WLB: 그가 다시 7일을 기다렸다가 비둘기를 내보냈는데 비둘기는 다시 돌아오지 않았습니다.

v.CNV: 到挪亚六百零一岁的时候，就在正月初一，地上的水都干了；挪亚移开方舟的盖看看，见地面已经干了。
v.ESV: In the six hundred and first year, in the first month, the first day of the month, the waters were dried from off the earth. And Noah removed the covering of the ark and looked, and behold, the face of the ground was dry.
v.GAE: 육백일 년 첫째 달 곧 그 달 초하룻날에 땅 위에서 물이 걷힌지라 노아가 방주 뚜껑을 제치고 본즉 지면에서 물이 걷혔더니
v.KJV: And it came to pass in the six hundredth and first year, in the first month, the first day of the month, the waters were dried up from off the earth: and Noah removed the covering of the ark, and looked, and, behold, the face of the ground was dry.
v.NASB: Now it came about in the six hundred and first year, in the first month, on the first of the month, the water was dried up from the earth. Then Noah removed the covering of the ark, and looked, and behold, the surface of the ground was dried up.
v.NIV: By the first day of the first month of Noah’s six hundred and first year, the water had dried up from the earth. Noah then removed the covering from the ark and saw that the surface of the ground was dry.
v.NRSV: In the six hundred first year, in the first month, on the first day of the month, the waters were dried up from the earth; and Noah removed the covering of the ark, and looked, and saw that the face of the ground was drying.
v.SAENEW: 노아가 육백한 살 되는 해 첫째 달, 곧 그 달 초하룻날, 땅 위에서 물이 다 말랐다. 노아가 방주 뚜껑을 열고, 바깥을 내다보니, 땅바닥이 말라 있었다.
v.WLB: 601년 첫째 달, 곧 그 달 1일에 땅 위의 물이 말랐습니다. 노아가 방주 덮개를 열고 보니 땅이 말라 있었습니다.

v.CNV: 到了二月二十七日，大地就都干了。
v.ESV: In the second month, on the twenty-seventh day of the month, the earth had dried out.
v.GAE: 둘째 달 스무이렛날에 땅이 말랐더라
v.KJV: And in the second month, on the seven and twentieth day of the month, was the earth dried.
v.NASB: In the second month, on the twenty-seventh day of the month, the earth was dry.
v.NIV: By the twenty-seventh day of the second month the earth was completely dry.
v.NRSV: In the second month, on the twenty-seventh day of the month, the earth was dry.
v.SAENEW: 둘째 달, 곧 그 달 스무이렛날에, 땅이 다 말랐다.
v.WLB: 둘째 달, 곧 그 달 27일에 땅은 완전히 말랐습니다.

v.CNV: 神告诉挪亚说：
v.ESV: Then God said to Noah,
v.GAE: 하나님이 노아에게 말씀하여 이르시되
v.KJV: And God spake unto Noah, saying,
v.NASB: Then God spoke to Noah, saying,
v.NIV: Then God said to Noah,
v.NRSV: Then God said to Noah,
v.SAENEW: 하나님이 노아에게 말씀하셨다.
v.WLB: 그때 하나님께서 노아에게 말씀하셨습니다.

v.CNV: “你要从方舟出来，你和你的妻子、儿子，以及儿媳都要和你一同出来。
v.ESV: “Go out from the ark, you and your wife, and your sons and your sons' wives with you.
v.GAE: 너는 네 아내와 네 아들들과 네 며느리들과 함께 방주에서 나오고
v.KJV: Go forth of the ark, thou, and thy wife, and thy sons, and thy sons’ wives with thee.
v.NASB: 'Go out of the ark, you and your wife and your sons and your sons' wives with you.
v.NIV: “Come out of the ark, you and your wife and your sons and their wives.
v.NRSV: “Go out of the ark, you and your wife, and your sons and your sons’ wives with you.
v.SAENEW: "너는 아내와 아들들과 며느리들을 데리고 방주에서 나가거라.
v.WLB: “너는 네 아내와 네 아들들과 네 며느리들과 함께 방주에서 나와라.

v.CNV: 所有和你在一起有生命的活物：飞鸟、牲畜和一切在地上爬行的动物，你都要带出来，使它们可以在地上滋生、繁殖，也可以在地上增多。”
v.ESV: Bring out with you every living thing that is with you of all flesh—birds and animals and every creeping thing that creeps on the earth—that they may swarm on the earth, and be fruitful and multiply on the earth.”
v.GAE: 너와 함께 한 모든 혈육 있는 생물 곧 새와 가축과 땅에 기는 모든 것을 다 이끌어내라 이것들이 땅에서 생육하고 땅에서 번성하리라 하시매
v.KJV: Bring forth with thee every living thing that is with thee, of all flesh, both of fowl, and of cattle, and of every creeping thing that creepeth upon the earth; that they may breed abundantly in the earth, and be fruitful, and multiply upon the earth.
v.NASB: 'Bring out with you every living thing of all flesh that is with you, birds and animals and every creeping thing that creeps on the earth, that they may breed abundantly on the earth, and be fruitful and multiply on the earth.'
v.NIV: Bring out every kind of living creature that is with you—the birds, the animals, and all the creatures that move along the ground—so they can multiply on the earth and be fruitful and increase in number on it.”
v.NRSV: Bring out with you every living thing that is with you of all flesh — birds and animals and every creeping thing that creeps on the earth — so that they may abound on the earth, and be fruitful and multiply on the earth.”
v.SAENEW: 네가 데리고 있는, 살과 피를 지닌 모든 생물들, 곧 새와 집짐승과 땅 위에서 기어다니는 모든 길짐승을 데리고 나가거라. 그래서 그것들이 땅에서 생육하고 땅에서 번성하게 하여라."
v.WLB: 너와 함께 있던 모든 생명들, 곧 새들과 짐승들과 땅 위에 기는 모든 것들을 데리고 나와라. 그것들이 땅에서 수가 불어나 새끼를 많이 낳고 땅 위에 번성할 것이다.”

v.CNV: 于是，挪亚出来了，他的儿子、妻子和儿媳都与他一同出来了；
v.ESV: So Noah went out, and his sons and his wife and his sons' wives with him.
v.GAE: 노아가 그 아들들과 그의 아내와 그 며느리들과 함께 나왔고
v.KJV: And Noah went forth, and his sons, and his wife, and his sons’ wives with him:
v.NASB: So Noah went out, and his sons and his wife and his sons' wives with him.
v.NIV: So Noah came out, together with his sons and his wife and his sons’ wives.
v.NRSV: So Noah went out with his sons and his wife and his sons’ wives.
v.SAENEW: 노아는 아들들과 아내와 며느리들을 데리고 나왔다.
v.WLB: 노아가 그 아들들과 그 아내와 그 며느리들과 함께 방주에서 나왔습니다.

v.CNV: 各样走兽、牲畜、飞禽和各样在地上爬行的动物，各从自己的族类，都出了方舟。
v.ESV: Every beast, every creeping thing, and every bird, everything that moves on the earth, went out by families from the ark.
v.GAE: 땅 위의 동물 곧 모든 짐승과 모든 기는 것과 모든 새도 그 종류대로 방주에서 나왔더라
v.KJV: Every beast, every creeping thing, and every fowl, and whatsoever creepeth upon the earth, after their kinds, went forth out of the ark.
v.NASB: Every beast, every creeping thing, and every bird, everything that moves on the earth, went out by their families from the ark.
v.NIV: All the animals and all the creatures that move along the ground and all the birds—everything that moves on land—came out of the ark, one kind after another.
v.NRSV: And every animal, every creeping thing, and every bird, everything that moves on the earth, went out of the ark by families.
v.SAENEW: 모든 짐승, 모든 길짐승, 모든 새, 땅 위를 기어다니는 모든 것도, 그 종류대로 방주에서 바깥으로 나왔다.
v.WLB: 모든 생물들, 곧 모든 짐승과 모든 새와 땅에서 기는 것이 다 그 종류대로 방주에서 나왔습니다.

v.CNV: 挪亚给耶和华筑了一座祭坛，拿各样洁净的牲畜和飞禽，献在祭坛上作为燔祭。
v.ESV: Then Noah built an altar to the Lord and took some of every clean animal and some of every clean bird and offered burnt offerings on the altar.
v.GAE: 노아가 여호와께 제단을 쌓고 모든 정결한 짐승과 모든 정결한 새 중에서 제물을 취하여 번제로 제단에 드렸더니
v.KJV: And Noah builded an altar unto the LORD; and took of every clean beast, and of every clean fowl, and offered burnt offerings on the altar.
v.NASB: Then Noah built an altar to the LORD, and took of every clean animal and of every clean bird and offered burnt offerings on the altar.
v.NIV: Then Noah built an altar to the Lord and, taking some of all the clean animals and clean birds, he sacrificed burnt offerings on it.
v.NRSV: Then Noah built an altar to the LORD, and took of every clean animal and of every clean bird, and offered burnt offerings on the altar.
v.SAENEW: 노아는 주님 앞에 제단을 쌓고, 모든 정결한 집짐승과 정결한 새들 가운데서 제물을 골라서, 제단 위에 번제물로 바쳤다.
v.WLB: 노아가 여호와를 위해 제단을 쌓고 정결한 짐승들과 정결한 새들 가운데 몇을 잡아 그 제단 위에 번제로 드렸습니다.

v.CNV: 耶和华闻了那馨香的气味，就心里说：“我必不再因人的缘故咒诅这地（因为人从小时开始心中所想的都是邪恶的）；我也必不再照着我作过的，击杀各样的活物。
v.ESV: And when the Lord smelled the pleasing aroma, the Lord said in his heart, “I will never again curse the ground because of man, for the intention of man's heart is evil from his youth. Neither will I ever again strike down every living creature as I have done.
v.GAE: 여호와께서 그 향기를 받으시고 그 중심에 이르시되 내가 다시는 사람으로 말미암아 땅을 저주하지 아니하리니 이는 사람의 마음이 계획하는 바가 어려서부터 악함이라 내가 전에 행한 것 같이 모든 생물을 다시 멸하지 아니하리니
v.KJV: And the LORD smelled a sweet savour; and the LORD said in his heart, I will not again curse the ground any more for man’s sake; for the imagination of man’s heart is evil from his youth; neither will I again smite any more every thing living, as I have done.
v.NASB: The LORD smelled the soothing aroma; and the LORD said to Himself, 'I will never again curse the ground on account of man, for the intent of man's heart is evil from his youth; and I will never again destroy every living thing, as I have done.
v.NIV: The Lord smelled the pleasing aroma and said in his heart: “Never again will I curse the ground because of humans, even though every inclination of the human heart is evil from childhood. And never again will I destroy all living creatures, as I have done.
v.NRSV: And when the LORD smelled the pleasing odor, the LORD said in his heart, “I will never again curse the ground because of humankind, for the inclination of the human heart is evil from youth; nor will I ever again destroy every living creature as I have done.
v.SAENEW: 주님께서 그 향기를 맡으시고서, 마음 속으로 다짐하셨다. "다시는 사람이 악하다고 하여서, 땅을 저주하지는 않겠다. 사람은 어릴 때부터 그 마음의 생각이 악하기 마련이다. 다시는 이번에 한 것 같이, 모든 생물을 없애지는 않겠다.
v.WLB: 여호와께서 그 좋은 향기를 맡으시고 마음속으로 말씀하셨습니다. “내가 다시는 사람으로 인해 땅을 저주하지 않겠다. 이는 사람이 생각하는 것이 어려서부터 악하기 때문이다. 내가 전에 했던 것처럼 다시는 모든 생물을 멸망시키지 않을 것이다.

v.CNV: 大地尚存之日，播种、收割，寒暑、冬夏、白昼和黑夜必然循环不息。”
v.ESV: While the earth remains, seedtime and harvest, cold and heat, summer and winter, day and night, shall not cease.”
v.GAE: 땅이 있을 동안에는 심음과 거둠과 추위와 더위와 여름과 겨울과 낮과 밤이 쉬지 아니하리라
v.KJV: While the earth remaineth, seedtime and harvest, and cold and heat, and summer and winter, and day and night shall not cease.
v.NASB: 'While the earth remains, Seedtime and harvest, And cold and heat, And summer and winter, And day and night Shall not cease.'
v.NIV: “As long as the earth endures, seedtime and harvest, cold and heat, summer and winter, day and night will never cease.”
v.NRSV: As long as the earth endures, seedtime and harvest, cold and heat, summer and winter, day and night, shall not cease.”
v.SAENEW: 땅이 있는 한, 뿌리는 때와 거두는 때, 추위와 더위, 여름과 겨울, 낮과 밤이 그치지 아니할 것이다."
v.WLB: 땅이 존재하는 한 씨 뿌리는 것과 추수하는 것과 추위와 더위와 여름과 겨울과 낮과 밤이 그치지 않을 것이다.”
